meta.label: 1D Geomechanical Model Curves — BDIEP Mnemonic Crosswalk
meta.label_pt: Crosswalk de Mnemonicos de Curvas do Modelo Geomecânico 1D (BDIEP)
meta.description: Maps BDIEP well-log mnemonic codes for 1D geomechanical model curves to canonical entities in the Geolytics corporate geomechanics ontology (geomechanics-corporate.json). Source: Petrobras BDIEP curve catalogue — 'Perfis interpretados / Geomecânica / Retroanálise'. Observed in 11 wells across Santos, Campos and Potiguar basins.
meta.qualifier_convention: Suffix 'PR' = Provável Retroanálise (probable retroanalysis — computed post-drilling with real measurements). Other expected suffixes: MIN (minimum/pessimistic), MAX (maximum/optimistic), DET (deterministic prognosis).
meta.unit_note: Curves are stored in BDIEP as absolute pressure (psi g — gauge psi). Canonical entities use gradient units (ppg, lb/gal, kgf/cm²/m). Conversion: gradient_ppg = pressure_psig / (0.052 × depth_ft).

mappings.notes: Direct retroanalysis counterpart of GEOMEC001. Lower bound of the mud weight window (GEOMEC003). Equivalent mnemonic without qualifier: PPOR.
Integrated overburden from density log (RHOB). Sets the upper theoretical bound on horizontal stresses. Acronym in GEOMEC007: Sv, GS.
Calibrated against LOT/xLOT measurements (GEOMEC006). Upper bound of the mud weight window (GEOMEC003). Acronym in GEOMEC002: Shmin, GF.
Estimated from breakout width and drilling-induced fractures (GEOMEC023). Determines fault regime (GEOMEC017) together with Sv and Shmin.

mappings.full_name_pt: Pressão de Colapso Inferior Provável – Retroanálise
mappings.entity_label_pt: Pressão de Colapso Inferior (Falha por Cisalhamento)
mappings.notes: Minimum mud weight to prevent shear failure (Mohr-Coulomb / Drucker-Prager criterion). Defines the absolute lower bound of the mud weight window (GEOMEC003). Distinguished from PCOSPR (upper collapse / lost circulation).

mappings.full_name_pt: Pressão de Colapso Superior Provável – Retroanálise
mappings.entity_label_pt: Pressão de Colapso Superior (Perda de Circulação)
mappings.notes: Maximum mud weight before inducing lost circulation through natural or induced fractures. Operationally distinct from PFRAPR: PCOSPR is a collapse criterion applied to the wellbore wall, PFRAPR is the far-field minimum stress. GEOMEC009A and GEOMEC009B together define the operational mud window (GEOMEC003).

mappings.full_name_pt: Pressão de Quebra da Formação Provável – Retroanálise
mappings.notes: Peak pressure at fracture initiation during hydraulic fracturing or xLOT. Distinct from GEOMEC053B (fracture propagation pressure, FPP), which is the lower sustained pressure after breakdown. PQBF > FPP in intact rock; PQBF ≈ FPP in pre-fractured formations.
